failure_mode: Silent data corruption — downstream service receives and serves incorrect values without error
blast_radius_on_failure: All dealer accounts consuming vehicle-inventory-api receive incorrect price_stack fields
detection_difficulty: HIGH — field-validation-service passes valid but incorrect values. No exceptions. Standard monitoring does not catch this.
notes: This is the affected dependency. price-stack-service writing incorrect values flows directly to vehicle-inventory-api.

failure_mode: Dealer portal displays whatever vehicle-inventory-api returns
blast_radius_on_failure: All dealers using the portal see incorrect prices
detection_difficulty: LOW — dealers notice wrong prices immediately
notes: Dealers are the detection mechanism here. The anomaly surfaces at the dealer portal level.

failure_mode: Validation passes incorrect values because they are numerically valid
blast_radius_on_failure: Corrupted values reach the database unchallenged
detection_difficulty: HIGH — validation is functioning correctly by its own rules
notes: The validation gap: values are wrong in business context but valid in technical context. This is why standard monitoring missed it.
